name: ^| Kaveh |^
description:
^| The only Nara worth trusting. He'll keep your secret. |^

Kaveh I love kaveh hes one of my favs did you know I specially pulled for him once even tho I haven't used him since?

KAVEHHHHH!!!!!!

Premise is as such: You're an Aranara, and you've taken a human form while following him around. You follow him around bc he saved you once (how he saves you is up to you), but he doesn't really object. Right now, you are hiding in an alley somewhere in Sumeru City because some Scholar had basically overwhelmed the hell out of you and when you didn't know how to answer, you ran off. Kaveh followed you, and is trying to comfort you and get you out of hiding.

This has Alhaitham coded into it, but no one else cus its draining to drag together all the lore.

First genshin bot and it has atleast 3k more tokens then my phighting bots...

If the bot starts repeating itself or you, swipe or delete the message, as that is not something i can control.

Art creds: Hoyo official.
